summary: Iteration 86: Backend tests for Profile Photo feature - ALL 13 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) GET /api/auth/me returns profile_photo field for all roles, (2) GET /api/users returns profile_photo field for each user, (3) PUT /api/auth/profile-photo accepts and stores base64 photo data, (4) GET /api/auth/me returns updated profile_photo after upload, (5) GET /api/users shows updated photo for the user who uploaded, (6) Login response includes profile_photo in user object.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/auth/me correctly returns profile_photo field (line 662-670 in server.py)
GET /api/users correctly returns all fields except password_hash including profile_photo (line 748-758 in server.py)
PUT /api/auth/profile-photo correctly stores base64 photo data in MongoDB (line 723-733 in server.py)
Login response includes profile_photo in UserResponse model (line 646-652 in server.py)
UserResponse model includes Optional[str] profile_photo field (line 207 in server.py)
seed_data_creation: Test profile photos uploaded for student and supervisor users during integration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 86 verified the profile photo backend APIs. All endpoints work correctly: GET /auth/me returns profile_photo, GET /users returns profile_photo for each user, PUT /auth/profile-photo stores base64 images, and login response includes profile_photo. The frontend is React Native (Expo) so cannot be browser-tested.

GET_users_profile_photo.all_users: PASS - returns profile_photo field for each user

integration.upload_and_verify_users_list: PASS - uploaded photo appears in /users list

login_response.includes_profile_photo: PASS - user object in login response includes profile_photo

edge_cases.empty_profile_photo: PASS - clears photo when empty string uploaded
